summary.zh: 把 OpenAI 的 codex CLI(@openai/codex)接成 ForgeaX Studio 的推理后端。runner spawn `codex exec --json` 子进程,把 ChatEvent 流桥接到消息总线;支持流式、思考、工具调用、子 agent 与会话。在面板管理认证并选用后,所有 agent 的推理走 codex 后端,适合想用 GPT-5 系列模型驱动开发循环的场景。
summary.en: Wires OpenAI's codex CLI (@openai/codex) in as a ForgeaX Studio reasoning backend. The runner spawns `codex exec --json` and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the bus, with streaming, thinking, tool calls, sub-agents and sessions. Once authenticated and selected in Admin, agents reason through codex — handy for driving the dev loop with the GPT-5 family.

body.zh:
Runner:codex exec --json
ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus
body.en:
Runner: codex exec --json
Bridges ChatEvent streams to the Bus

body.zh:
流式 / 思考 / 工具调用 / 子 agent / 会话
模型:gpt-5 / gpt-5-codex
body.en:
streaming / thinking / tool calls / sub-agents / sessions
Models: gpt-5 / gpt-5-codex

body.zh: 面板管理 → CLI 后端 → 选择并认证
